mapper.insert: INSERT INTO innovation_teams (team_name, project_name, leader_id, status, description, created_at) VALUES (#{teamName}, #{projectName}, #{leaderId}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE s.user_id = #{leaderId}
SELECT * FROM innovation_teams WHERE team_name = #{teamName} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE innovation_teams
team_name = #{teamName},
project_name = #{projectName},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_applications (team_id, student_id, application_letter, status, apply_time) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{studentId}, #{applicationLetter}, #{status}, #{applyTime})
